items.title: Udoka calls out Rockets after collapse: 'Grow up'
items.dek: Rockets coach Ime Udoka called out his team after a late-game collapse that saw Houston fall into a 3-0 series hole against the Lakers. "Horrendous mistakes," h
items.body: Rockets coach Ime Udoka called out his team after a late-game collapse that saw Houston fall into a 3-0 series hole against the Lakers. "Horrendous mistakes," he said. "I don't know if you want to say youth or scared of the moment, or whatever the case."
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Dozens of sloths died before opening of Sloth World attraction in Florida
items.dek: Many died due to conditions at a Florida warehouse where they'd been shipped, while others arrived from South America dead, authorities say.
items.body: Many died due to conditions at a Florida warehouse where they'd been shipped, while others arrived from South America dead, authorities say.

items.title: Heated Rivalry, The Housemaid and Fourth Wing: TikTok launches BookTok bestseller list
items.dek: The inaugural top 20 is entirely made up of female authors, with Chloe Walsh appearing most frequently.
items.body: The inaugural top 20 is entirely made up of female authors, with Chloe Walsh appearing most frequently.
